name: Claws of the Beast
text: Equipped creature gains +2 Atk Dice Rolls for 1 turn cycle. If "Wings of the Beast" is also equipped to this creature, it gains +3 Atk Dice Rolls instead.

condition.text: Equipped creature; check if Wings of the Beast is also equipped

effects.actionText: Apply conditional temporary Atk Dice Rolls bonus
effects.value: Atk Dice Rolls +2 for 1 turn cycle; +3 instead if Wings of the Beast also equipped

params.valueText: Atk Dice Rolls +2 for 1 turn cycle; +3 instead if Wings of the Beast also equipped

condition.text: Equipped creature; check if Wings of the Beast is also equipped

effects.notes: Non-stacking replacement: +3 instead of +2 when Wings of the Beast is also equipped. Turn cycle is one full round back to the same player.
